summary: The user is planning a road trip to the mountains in June and is preparing their bike for the journey, including purchasing a Saris Bones 2-Bike Trunk Rack. They have set a goal to reach 1000 miles of cycling by the end of summer and are seeking advice on bike maintenance, safety in low-light conditions, and bike insurance options.
facts: The user plans a road trip to the mountains in June. The user is considering purchasing a Saris Bones 2-Bike Trunk Rack. The user has clocked 347 miles on their bike since the start of the year. The user's goal is to reach 1000 miles by the end of summer. The user commutes to work by bike, covering about 10 miles round trip. The user recently installed a new set of bike lights for $40. The user is due to lubricate their bike chain on May 15th. The user is looking for bike-friendly routes or trails in the mountains for their road trip.
